Client Case Study

How Perfect Parking Asphalt Services Went from 1 Lead/Day to 3 Leads/Day While Cutting CPL 31%

A Virginia asphalt contractor needed a predictable lead flow. We built a Google Ads engine that exceeded targets within weeks and expanded into new service lines.

Client: Perfect Parking Asphalt Services
Location: Harrisonburg, VA
Industry: Asphalt Paving & Sealcoating
Service: Google Ads
32
Leads in 12 Days
$127
Cost Per Lead
31%
CPL Reduction
62.8%
Impression Share
The Challenge

Building a Predictable Lead Pipeline from Scratch

Perfect Parking Asphalt Services needed a consistent flow of qualified leads for their paving, sealcoating, and striping services in the Harrisonburg, Virginia area. The owner, Alex Klimenko, was booked through winter but needed a scalable system to maintain momentum heading into the busy season. Their initial goal was simple: one qualified lead per day.

The Strategy

Precision Google Ads with Service-Line Expansion

We launched with asphalt and driveway paving campaigns as the primary lead drivers, using phrase match keywords and a comprehensive negative keyword strategy to eliminate waste. As the account matured, we expanded into dedicated campaigns for sealcoating and parking lot striping, each with separate budgets and targeting.

Budget discipline was critical — we monitored spend daily to stay within the approved $8,000-$9,000 monthly budget while maximizing lead volume. Conversion tracking was optimized for both phone calls and form submissions to capture every qualified inquiry.

Google Ads Negative Keywords Campaign Expansion Budget Management Conversion Tracking
The Results

3x the Target Lead Volume

Within weeks, the account exceeded every target. The goal was one qualified lead per day — we delivered three.

32
Leads in 12 Days
Nearly 3 leads per day compared to the target of 1 per day, exceeding the goal by 3x.
$127
Cost Per Lead
Down from $185 in the previous period — a 31% reduction driven by negative keyword strategy and optimization.
62.8%
Impression Share
Outperforming competitors including R Williams Paving, Finley Asphalt, and Capital Paving.
76.3%
Top of Page Rate
Ads appearing in the top 3 positions over 76% of the time, with 56.8% absolute top position.
3x

Lead Target Exceeded

With average residential asphalt paving jobs in Virginia ranging from $4,500 to $9,000, each $127 lead represents a potential 35-70x return on ad spend when closed. The primary constraint on this account became budget, not demand — the owner reported being overwhelmed with estimates, a problem every contractor wants to have.
